certifications.name: Google Cybersecurity Certificate
certifications.description: 8-course professional certificate covering foundational security concepts, Linux, Python automation, SIEM tools, IDS/IPS, and incident response frameworks.

certifications.name: CompTIA Network+
certifications.description: Validates ability to establish network connectivity, implement network security, and troubleshoot infrastructure. Foundation for all cybersecurity certifications and required for many DoD positions.

certifications.name: CompTIA Security+
certifications.description: Industry-standard baseline cybersecurity certification. DoD 8570/8140 compliant — required for many government contractor and federal security roles. Covers threats, cryptography, IAM, and risk management.

certifications.name: Certified Ethical Hacker (CEH)
certifications.description: Advanced offensive security certification validating penetration testing skills and ethical hacking methodologies. Target credential after achieving Security+.
